# Liberty Lighthouse

> A classical liberal resource for understanding India's policy landscape through curated FAQs, video curricula, and guided syllabi. A project of the Centre for Civil Society.

## Topics
- [Education](/topics/education/): FAQs, videos, and syllabus on education policy in India
- [Agriculture](/topics/agriculture/): FAQs, videos, and syllabus on agriculture policy in India

## Content Types
- FAQs: Curated question-answer pairs on Indian policy — available at /topics/{topic}/faq/
- Videos: YouTube video curricula with notes — available at /topics/{topic}/videos/
- Guided Syllabi: Curated reading lists with books, papers, articles — available at /topics/{topic}/syllabus/

## About
- [About Liberty Lighthouse](/about/): Mission, purpose, and the Centre for Civil Society
- [Search](/search/): Full-text search across all content

## Full Content
- [Full content dump for LLMs](/llms-full.txt): All FAQ content, video descriptions, and syllabus text as plain Markdown
